markdown:
# PP-R/PP-RCT Pipes and Fittings for drinkable hot and cold water

[![](https://www.k-aqua.de/Pics/products_kaqua_house.jpg)](https://www.k-aqua.de/Pics/products_kaqua_house_zoom.jpg)

## K-Aqua product range

The K-Aqua PP-R/PP-RCT piping system includes different types of pipes (mono layer and multilayer reinforced pipes with glass fiber) with several wall thicknesses in SDR 6, SDR 7,4, SDR9, SDR 11 and SDR 17. Depending of the pipe type the available dimensions starts from size 20 mm up to 630 mm. The fittings are available in sizes 20 mm up to 315 mm as well ascomplementary products like valves, unions, cutting tools, welding equipment, welding devices, and more...

![](https://www.k-aqua.de/Pics/mobile_products.jpg)

[PDF K-Aqua product range](https://www.k-aqua.de/PDF/K-Aqua_Product_Range_en.pdf)

PP-R/PP-RCT Pipes and Fittings for drinkable hot and cold water

K-Aqua product range

The K-Aqua PP-R/PP-RCT piping system includes different types of pipes (mono layer and multilayer reinforced pipes with glass fiber) with several wall thicknesses in SDR 6, SDR 7,4, SDR9, SDR 11 and SDR 17. Depending of the pipe type the available dimensions starts from size 20 mm up to 630 mm. The fittings are available in sizes 20 mm up to 315 mm as well ascomplementary products like valves, unions, cutting tools, welding equipment, welding devices, and more...

json.company_description: The K-Aqua PP-R/PP-RCT piping system includes different types of pipes (mono layer and multilayer reinforced pipes with glass fiber) with several wall thicknesses in SDR 6, SDR 7,4, SDR9, SDR 11 and SDR 17. Depending on the pipe type, the available dimensions start from size 20 mm up to 630 mm. The fittings are available in sizes 20 mm up to 315 mm as well as complementary products like valves, unions, cutting tools, welding equipment, welding devices, and more.

summary: The K-Aqua product range features PP-R/PP-RCT pipes and fittings designed for drinkable hot and cold water systems. The piping system includes mono layer and multilayer reinforced pipes with varying wall thicknesses in SDR 6, SDR 7.4, SDR 9, SDR 11, and SDR 17. Pipe dimensions range from 20 mm to 630 mm, and fittings are available from 20 mm to 315 mm. Complementary products encompass valves, unions, cutting tools, and welding equipment.
